Abhigyan (Abhi) Arya

I build things, write lots of code, and sleep a little bit too late.
Computer Science, Engineering, and Math Student at UC Irvine

abhigyaa@uci.edu

  • Bio
  • Projects
  • Experience

Bio

Hey, I’m Abhi! I’m an Undergrad CSE & Math Student at UC Irvine and a software engineer, who, in just my first year of University: Worked at NASA as a Civil Servant displaying Autonomous Systems Subject-matter Expertise; Raised $6k in research funds for XR/Mission Systems Software; Shipped a startup getting 300 users in a day, and won 4 hackathons in a row. I’m interested in (and actively learning more about) backend system design, efficient APIs, algorithms, autonomy, and data-driven user experiences alongside AI/ML interactivity and multimodal inference.

If you'd like to chat about deep/space tech, software, AI, research, or the great outdoors, feel free to reach out on LinkedIn or at abhigyaa[at]uci.edu

Projects

  • All
  • AI/ML
  • Embedded Software
  • Full Stack Development

Codespace: Interactive Lecture Learning Code

Real-time Lecture Hall Solution for Professors to engage with Students.

Learning, Edtech, Interactivity, Realtime

Sift: Search Everything Code

Vector Search every knowledge base you have in one place.

CalHacks 2024, Rust, OAuth, SocketIO, Vector Databases

Tuna: Simplified Fine Tuning Code

Developed localized platform for rapid AI development with automatic dataset generation and cloud compute.

Python, AWS, GCP, RAG, Cloud Computing

Block Thing Code

Developed a new flavor of Scratch, powered by AI, with 1-1 correspondence between blocks and code, using RAG AI for automated code generation to teach early CS education.

Winner, Most Creative Product, HackMIT 2024

Opennote: Redefining Education with AI Code

Designed and deployed advanced multimodal and personalized systems for learning.

Winner, Digital Experience Track, LAHacks 2024 (UCLA)

ZotConnect: Connecting Professors and Students Code

Developed a platform for students to connect with professors and peers for research, using AI-based search and resume reviews for curated applications

1st Place/Best Overall, IrvineHacks 2024 (UCI)

Coauthor: AI-based Research Collaboration Code

Developed a platform for researchers to collaborate on papers in real-time, using RAG AI for automated browsing and sourcing

Winner, SFHacks 2024

Copilot Avionics Module Code

Built micro flight computer for amateur rocketry, creating datalogging, control, and telemetry systems for autonomous high-powered flight

C++, Arduino, Rocketry, Avionics, Embedded Software

AntSat 01 Computer - Avionics Lead Paper

Led avionics team for UCI's first CubeSat, developing flight computer, power systems, and telemetry framework from scratch in embedded Linux for satellite launch

C++, Linux, CubeSat, Avionics, Embedded Software

Polaris: Framework for Astronaut EVAs Paper

Developed an all-encompassing framework to simplify astronaut space walks and mission control systems by developing Python API and Full-Stack GUIs for real-time mission control and heads-up-displays.

NASA, Spacewalks, Astronauts, Frameworks

Algorithmic Trading Code

Developed algorithmic trading platform for high-frequency trading, using Python for real-time data and trend analysis, outputting possible trading strategies. (not used in production or for actual purchase)

Python, Trading, Finance, Quantitative Analysis, Algorithms

Experience

View my full resume here.

  • Stoke Space Technologies Jan 2025- Present
    Software Engineering Intern (Incoming)
    Nova Flight Software Team, Starting Summer 2025 🚀
  • NASA Johnson Space Center Aug 2024 - Dec 2024
    Software Engineering Intern
    Autonomous Systems Software for the Gateway Space Station.
  • Opennote Nov 2024 - Present
    Cofounder, CTO
    Perfecting interactive learning one student at a time
  • NASA Johnson Space Center Jan 2025 - Present
    SWE Research Tech Lead
    Designed LiDAR and Vision-based Navigation for EVAs.
  • UCI Institute for Future Health Jun 2024 - Aug 2024
    Software Engineering Intern
    AWS Platform and Backend for Health Analytics and Inference
  • NASA Johnson Space Center Nov 2023 - Jun 2024
    Software Engineering Researcher
    Led development of full EVA software suite for the Artemis missions.
  • UCI CubeSat Sep 2023 - Present
    Lead Avionics Engineer
    Leading the avionics stack development of UCI's first CubeSat, AntSat 01.
  • University of California, Irvine (UCI) Sep 2023 - Jun 2027
    B.S. Computer Science and Engineering & Mathematics
    GPA 3.99/4.0
  • UCI School of Social Sciences Jun 2022 - Aug 2022
    AI and Education Researcher
    Measured model bias through NLP and ML models in educational settings.
